name: Bake and Baste Chicken (Boston Chicken)
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breast halves, washed and patted dry
1/4 cup Butter or margarine or Canola oil
1/2 teaspoon Garlic salt or to taste
20 ounces Frozen chopped spinach, cooked according to package directions, well drained OR 2 pounds Fresh spinach, cleaned, stems removed, chopped, cooked and drained
1 tablespoon Dry onion, chopped, or 1 small onion, peeled, ends removed, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine the canola oil, honey, lime juice, and paprika.
3. Place chicken, skin side up, in a 7x11 inch baking dish.
4. Apply the mixture to chicken pieces in a single layer.
5. Bake in the oven for 35-40 minutes, basting every 8-10 minutes or until well browned and juices run clear when cut into the thickest part of the chicken.
6. Remove from the oven.
7. Cover with foil for 15 minutes to keep the chicken hot until served.
CREAMED SPINACH (like at Boston Chicken)
1. In a large saucepan over medium heat, whisk together the celery soup, flour, butter or margarine or Canola oil, garlic salt, salt, and pepper until smooth and piping hot.
2. Add cooked and drained spinach, chopped onion or diced onion.
3. Serve as a side dish for 4-6 people.
